name: ph_rank_day_one
definition: Highest daily rank achieved on Product Hunt within 24 hours of launch (1 = #1 product of the day).
target_hint: Top 5 is strong; Top 1 typically requires a pre-built audience >10k engaged followers. Don't optimize for rank at the cost of ICP fit.

name: ph_upvotes_24h
definition: Total upvotes received in the 24 hours from 12:01am PT to 11:59pm PT on launch day.
target_hint: 300–600 = above average launch; 1,000+ = Top 5 territory; 1,500+ = competitive for #1 on a normal Tuesday.

name: ph_comment_count
definition: Number of unique commenters on the launch page in the first 24 hours, excluding the maker's own replies.
target_hint: 40+ commenters indicates a thread that's resonating; <15 suggests low engagement even if upvotes are decent.

name: ph_referral_traffic_24h
definition: Sessions from producthunt.com referrer to your landing page in the 24-hour launch window.
target_hint: Top 10 launch: 3,000–8,000 sessions. Top 5: 5,000–15,000. Top 1: 15,000–40,000+. Heavily category-dependent.

name: ph_to_signup_rate
definition: Signups attributable to PH-referred sessions divided by total PH-referred sessions during launch week.
target_hint: 8–18% for a focused landing page with strong message match. <5% means landing page is failing to convert curious traffic.

name: ph_to_paid_30d
definition: Paying customers acquired from PH-referred signups within 30 days of launch.
target_hint: 1–4% of PH visitors who sign up convert to paid within 30d; PH skews curious-not-buying for B2B, so don't expect SQL-level conversion.

name: follower_growth_launch_week
definition: Net new followers gained on the founder's primary social account (X or LinkedIn) during the 7-day launch window.
target_hint: Successful Top-10 launches typically yield +500 to +5,000 followers depending on category. <100 indicates the launch didn't break out of PH.

name: featured_in_ph_newsletter
definition: Boolean — did the launch appear in PH's daily or weekly editorial newsletter (~1M+ subscribers).
target_hint: Strong correlation with Top 5 finish + high-quality discussion thread. Newsletter feature can extend launch traffic by 3–7 additional days.
